title: cheilotheca humilis
intro: Cheilotheca humilis, also known as the 'small-lipped orchid', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cheilotheca humilis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as fight off infections. Cheilotheca humilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
